Video.summary: Ross Martin & Martha Raye guest! Martha & Carol play mismatched jurors, and Ross is in "Storefront Hospital."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Ross Martin

Video.summary: Star Eydie Gorme shares a hospital room. Also, Tim plays a man whose houseplant hates him, and The Oldest Man.
Video.title: Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi and Richard Crenna take part in a salute to the "bad girls" of cinema.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Richard Crenna

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi joins Carol, Burt Reynolds shows up for Q&A, and John Davidson salutes classic movies from MGM.
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds

Image.alt: Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds
Ruth Buzzi, John Davidson, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: Paul Sand guests! Sketches dealing with weddings are featured. Also: bits related to the energy crisis.
Video.title: Paul Sand

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Charo guest! Tim plays a man at a unisex salon, a guy trying to stay awake, and a journalist.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Charo

Video.summary: Martha Raye guests, appearing in "Carol & Sis" as an Irish maid. Harvey fantasizes about being a matador.
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Jim Nabors is like Caine in "Kung Fu" in a spoof of the David Carradine TV series, here entitled "Yung Fool."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Tim & Harvey are generals at the signing of a peace treaty, while "The Family" gathers for Mae's funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest star Steve Lawrence takes the stage to sing a duet with Dick.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guest Glen Campbell appears in a sketch spoofing "A Star Is Born." Also, Tim is a guinea pig for a cure.
Video.title: Glen Campbell

Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests in the WWII spoof "Mrs. Magnificent." On "Carol & Sis", Roger gets dragged into a PTA show.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Sketches include Harvey and Tim as dueling pianists, and a love triangle between Harvey, Cher...and Carol.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Cher

Video.summary: Soupy Sales and Gloria Loring star. Loring spoofs "Valley Of The Dolls." Sales and Carol play newlyweds.
Video.title: Gloria Loring, Soupy Sales

Video.summary: Joel Grey and Vincent Price play guests at a hotel where Carol is the switchboard operator.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Carol & Sis come home from a costume party. Meanwhile, Carol and Harvey delight with a pair of sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Cass Elliot & Tim Conway star! Cass & Carol browse literature, and Tim is an odd substitute in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Guests Robert Goulet and Imogene Coca take part in a fairy tale musical extravaganza.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Guests Nancy Wilson and Nanette Fabray are here for tonight's "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Imogene Coca joins Carol, while Harvey and Carol interview with Miss America and the parody "Bonnie And Clod."
Video.title: Imogene Coca

Video.summary: Guests Mama Cass Elliot and Ken Berry offer up some musical numbers and a series of commercial parodies.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Lucille Ball and Mel Torme spoof the classic comedy "Some Like It Hot" with a gender-flipping twist.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays an unsuccessful comic. Also: commercial spoofs; Tim at war, attempting to fire a cannon.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Jack Gilford guests. Gilford plays a man whose life is transformed by a hat and drops in on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Jack Gilford

Video.summary: Vicki plays an author whose changes to her story are acted out, and Tim demonstrates the latest in safety.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Kitchen commercials highlight this episode, and Tim returns as the steelworker looking to do away with Carol.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol's guests are George Chakiris and Shirley Jones!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley Jones, George Chakiris

Video.summary: Comedian Alan King guest stars as Carol's distracted psychiatrist.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Alan King

Video.summary: Invisible dogs run amok in an obedience class, while insurance agent Carol pesters doctor Tim.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Helen Reddy & John Byner appear in parodies. John is in a "Nora Desmond" sketch, and Vicki plays columnist.
Video.title: Helen Reddy, John Byner

Video.summary: Jack Klugman plays a skeptical man annoyed by his sister-in-law's visiting date--a clairvoyant.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jack Klugman

Video.summary: Dyan Cannon & Paul Lynde star. Lynde plays an insurance salesman, and Cannon is on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Dyan Cannon, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Features Dick as an airport traveller getting a farewell, and Tim as a steelworker seeking to do in his wife.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Mickey Rooney star in a meeting between First Ladies, an audition, and the spoof "Kids Town."
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: Carol salutes MGM with the help of guest stars Chita Rivera and Bob Newhart. Spoofs of classic movies abound.
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests. Features Harvey's Emmy Award speech, and a presentation of "Hollywood Canteen."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Vincent Price & Joan Rivers star! Vincent crosses paths with Alice Portnoy, then appears in "The Walnuts."
Video.title: Vincent Price, Joan Rivers

Video.summary: A "Family Show", featuring "The Family"! Harvey and Carol can't stop making little digs at each other.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Nanette Fabray star in "As The Stomach Turns." On "Carol & Sis", siblings practice First Aid.
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns in "The Wonderful World Of Hospitals." "Carol & Sis" finds Carol stuck in a helmet.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters
